{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/12016013?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nicky-cc/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nicky-cc/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nicky-cc/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nicky-cc/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/nicky-cc", "id": 12016013, "login": "nicky-cc", "node_id": "MDQ6VXNlcjEyMDE2MDEz", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nicky-cc/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nicky-cc/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nicky-cc/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nicky-cc/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/nicky-cc/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/nicky-cc", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-41332", "cvss": {"score": 4.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 4.9, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:L/UI:N/S:C/C:L/I:L/A:N"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-184", "name": "Incomplete List of Disallowed Inputs"}], "description": "## Summary

Host execution env sanitization did not block `GIT_TEMPLATE_DIR` or `AWS_CONFIG_FILE`, even though both can redirect trusted tooling to attacker-controlled content.

## Impact

An approved exec request could redirect git or AWS CLI behavior through attacker-controlled configuration and execute untrusted code or load attacker-selected credentials.

## Affected Component

`src/infra/host-env-security-policy.json, src/infra/host-env-security.ts`

## Fixed Versions

- Affected: `<= 2026.3.24`
- Patched: `>= 2026.3.28`
- Latest stable `2026.3.28` contains the fix.

## Fix

Fixed by commit `6eb82fba3c` (`Infra: block additional host exec env keys`).

OpenClaw thanks @nicky-cc of Tencent zhuque Lab [https://github.com/Tencent/AI-Infra-Guard](https://github.com/Tencent/AI-Infra-Guard) for reporting.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00105, "percentile": 0.0131}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-m866-6qv5-p2fg", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-03-31T23:57:00Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m866-6qv5-p2fg", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-m866-6qv5-p2fg"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-41332"}], "nvd_published_at": null, "published_at": "2026-03-31T23:57:00Z", "references": ["https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/security/advisories/GHSA-m866-6qv5-p2fg", "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/commit/6eb82fba3cbfd0e50b179c1fada92e1e22dce7fa", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openclaw-code-execution-via-missing-environment-variable-blocklist", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m866-6qv5-p2fg"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/openclaw/openclaw/security-advisories/GHSA-m866-6qv5-p2fg", "severity": "medium", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw", "summary": "OpenClaw host-env blocklist missing `GIT_TEMPLATE_DIR` and `AWS_CONFIG_FILE` allows code execution via env override", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-05-06T23:22:18Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-m866-6qv5-p2fg", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2026.3.28", "package": {"ecosystem": "npm", "name": "openclaw"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2026.3.24"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

reasons: 資産不一致または判定情報不足

title: OpenClaw host-env blocklist missing `GIT_TEMPLATE_DIR` and `AWS_CONFIG_FILE` allows code execution via env override
